commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=99c3637884e1c16a66ba568eb0748067e384bc47)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the heartbeat runner so plain text heartbeat replies are suppressed when message-tool mode expected `heartbeat_respond` but the model did not call it, and adds a focused regression test for the text case.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +21. Total +31 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. the issue has a high-confidence source reproduction path: configure `messages.visibleReplies: "message_tool"`, return a no-tool heartbeat final payload, and current main falls through to durable channel delivery when `shouldSkipMain` is false. I did not execute it because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for both a code fix and real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not take over proof that only the contributor’s setup can provide.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
